name: medicine-wheel
description: Medicine Wheel — Interactive visual layer for Indigenous relational research with Four Directions, ceremonies, and narrative arcs

scripts.version:patch: npm version patch -ws --no-git-tag-version && node scripts/sync-versions.mjs && shx rm -rf node_modules src/*/node_modules package-lock.json && npm install --legacy-peer-deps
scripts.version:minor: npm version minor -ws --no-git-tag-version && node scripts/sync-versions.mjs && shx rm -rf node_modules src/*/node_modules package-lock.json && npm install --legacy-peer-deps
scripts.version:major: npm version major -ws --no-git-tag-version && node scripts/sync-versions.mjs && shx rm -rf node_modules src/*/node_modules package-lock.json && npm install --legacy-peer-deps
scripts.prepublishOnly: npm run clean:packages && npm run build:packages
scripts.publish:packages: npm run prepublishOnly && npm publish -ws --access public
scripts.publish:dry: npm run prepublishOnly && npm publish -ws --access public --dry-run
